scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "bun run --filter web dev" "bun run --filter server dev"
scripts.build: bun run --filter web build && bun run --filter server build
scripts.preview: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "bun run --filter web preview" "bun run --filter server dev"
scripts.test:all: bun run test:shared && bun run test:server && bun run test:web && bun run test:e2e
